t_ch: 你做得真棒。
t_en: You did a great job.

t_ch: 「因为我们信仰『神秘』星神。」他沉吟片刻。
t_en: "It's because we're believers of the Aeon of Enigmata." He stays silent in deep thought for a moment.

t_ch: 「如果神秘不再笼罩宇宙，每个人都会察觉到自己被注定的命运，他们自以为通过*自由意志*做出的选择，都是在那个*时刻*必然出现的。」
t_en: "If the universe is no longer shrouded in mysteries, then everyone will detect the determined state of their destinies. A choice they think they make through free will is actually pre-arranged for that particular moment."

t_ch: 我不相信你说的话。
t_en: I don't believe you.

t_ch: 证明给我看。
t_en: Prove it to me.

t_ch: 「我会证明给你看的，只需要对你之前的经历改上几笔。」他突然露出落寞的眼神。「你要切实忘掉过去，才能假装对未来一无所知。」
t_en: "I'll prove it to you. All I have to do is to make some changes to your past." Suddenly, his eyes are tinged with despondence. "You must genuinely forget about your past to pretend that you know nothing about your future."

t_ch: 「好了。记住，在代码构造的模拟世界之外，你察觉到任何矛盾，别怀疑，都是本人的伟大手笔——记住，我并不是被*模拟*出来的！」
t_en: "It's done. If you notice any contradictions beyond the simulated world created by codes, don't doubt them, as they are all my brilliant touches. Remember, I'm not 'simulated'!"

t_ch: 你又来到了富丽堂皇的图书馆。你抬头看去，可以看到众多星系，它们如银河污泥般被搅成胶状，缓慢流动。
t_en: Once again, you arrive at the opulent library. You look up and see a multitude of star systems. Like cosmic sludge that has been stirred into jelly, they swirl around slowly in the sky.

t_ch: 图书馆正中央古老的楼梯，呈螺旋状一直通到天上，看不到尽头。
t_en: The ancient staircase in the center of the library spirals up into the sky, with no end to be seen.

t_ch: 「你怎么又来了？」虚构史学家呵斥道。「这次又有什么历史想让我帮你改改？」
t_en: "Why are you here again?" The History Fictionologist scolds you. "What kind of history do you want me to change this time?"

t_ch: 你身处一片无垠的废墟，视野被废弃集装箱遮蔽。这里弥漫着浓烟，报废的机器人被拆成零碎的部件。它们的躯干上印着「星际和平公司」字样，脑袋挨着脚底，不再拥有智能。
t_en: You are in a sprawling wasteland, and your vision is obscured by abandoned containers. Thick smoke permeates the air, and scrapped robots are dismantled into broken parts. The words "IPC" are printed on their torsos as their heads rest next to their feet, no longer sentient.

t_ch: 此时，你身后的垃圾堆传来窸窣的声音。你察觉有东西正盯着你——你回头，发现一个机器人躲在箱子后面。
t_en: A rustling comes from the pile of trash behind you. You sense someone's eyes on you. As you turn around, you notice a robot hiding behind a box.

t_ch: 你走近它身旁——你发现机器人的线缆已经断裂，失去了行动能力。
t_en: You approach the robot and find that it is incapacitated with its cables snapped.

t_ch: 「我们被誉为『琥珀王后援队』，*塔拉梵•基恩*制造我们、使用我们，并最终放弃了我们。」机器人向你展示它用尽力气保存的物品。
t_en: "We were hailed as the Amber Lord's Support Team. Taravan Keane created us, used us, and ultimately abandoned us." The robot shows you the items it is trying its best to keep safe.

t_ch: 「杰姆·哈克在<unbreak>371029</unbreak>秒前已经停止运转，杰姆·哈尔即将在<unbreak>74158</unbreak>秒后停止运转，无法再保存哥哥的物品。不情之请，请您带一个离开这里。」
t_en: "Jim Hulk stopped functioning <unbreak>371,029</unbreak> seconds ago. Jim Hall is about to stop functioning in <unbreak>74,158</unbreak> seconds and can no longer keep my brother's items. Please help me. Bring one of these out of here."

t_ch: 你身处一个漆黑的房间。面前的电视机正放映购物频道——来自星际和平公司传统项目部门。
t_en: You are in a pitch-black room. The television before you is showing an infomercial channel funded by the IPC Traditional Project Department.

t_ch: 「热夜之都电视购物频道，在节目开始，我们先回复观众来电，对于测不准匣的投诉。众所周知，如果测不准匣可以测得准，那么它应该名叫测得准匣……呲……」
t_en: "You're watching the Capital of Passion infomercial channel. Before we start, we'd like to respond to the complaints on the Casket of Inaccuracy lodged by our viewers. As you know, if the Casket of Inaccuracy is accurate, it should be called the 'Casket of Accuracy' instead... *crackle*..."

t_ch: 老旧电视机开始泛起雪花屏，它的信号变得越来越差。很快，你完全无法听清声音了。
t_en: Static appears on the old television as the signals get weaker. Soon, you cannot even hear the sound clearly.

t_ch: 拍他一下。
t_en: Smack it.

t_ch: 你拍了电视机一下，它的屏幕闪烁两下，接着恢复了正常的画面。
t_en: You smack the television. Its screen flickers twice and returns to normal.

t_ch: 踹它一脚。
t_en: Kick it.

t_ch: 你踹了电视机一下，痛感从脚趾传来——按钮刺进了你的指甲缝。电视机的屏幕闪烁两下，接着恢复了正常的画面。
t_en: You kick the television, and a surge of pain shoots up from your toes — a button wedges between your flesh and your toenail. The television screen flickers twice and returns to normal.

t_ch: 「接下来是星际和平公司为我们带来的跨银河产品。」
t_en: "Next, we'd like to introduce a pan-cosmic product from IPC."

t_ch: 「一盒过期的甜甜圈。热夜之都已经进入第IV纪年，食物的保质期已经接近于永恒。公民们都很好奇，过期的食物究竟是什么味道。」
t_en: "A box of expired doughnuts. As the Capital of Passion has entered its 4th era, food can almost be preserved forever. Thus, the citizens are curious about how expired food tastes."

t_ch: 「会唱生日快乐的莲花。共同的童年回忆，它无数次出现在梦里。」
t_en: "A lotus that can sing the Happy Birthday song. As a feature in everyone's childhood, it appears countless times in people's dreams."

t_ch: 「一个机械匣子。看上去像是卖了两百年也没卖出去的东西。」
t_en: "A mechanical box. It looks like it didn't manage to get sold for over <unbreak>200</unbreak> years."

t_ch: 你陷入了沉思中。
t_en: You are lost in thought.

t_ch: 你吃了甜甜圈，你感觉自己的胃有奇怪的动静……
t_en: You take a bite of the doughnut and feel your stomach churning...

t_ch: 莲花唱起歌，你被唤起童年回忆，你仿佛回到上个时代……
t_en: As the lotus starts singing, your childhood memories come flooding back. You seem to have traveled back in time to the previous era...

t_ch: 你打开了匣子，里面似乎有奇怪的东西……
t_en: You open the box and see something odd inside...

t_ch: 购物节目令你如痴如醉。你还想接着看，但屏幕「咻」地关闭了。
t_en: The infomercial is addictive. You want to keep watching, but the screen suddenly turns off.

t_ch: 电视机碎了！一些奇怪的东西从里面蹦了出来。
t_en: The television shattered! Some strange things are coming out of it.

t_ch: 这个洞穴十分安宁，半空中跳跃的虫团像彩星。一位女士睡在洞中，脚边爬满诺布莱斯虫，她的皮肤像*灰质*一样没有色泽。
t_en: It is quiet and peaceful inside the cave. The groups of insects jumping in the air look like colorful stars in the sky. A lady with a gray-matter-esque complexion is sleeping in the cave with Noblesse Worms crawling at her feet.

t_ch: 她睁开眼，看见你时，她身边瞬间冒出一团彩色的火焰，火舌沿着皱壁蔓延，很快触到你的脚掌，你顷刻被火焰包围。
t_en: When she opens her eyes and sees you, a colorful flame instantly materializes next to her, spreads along the wall, and soon reaches your feet. You're surrounded by fire in an instant.

t_ch: 无数记忆在你的脑内涌现，你感到精神开始过热。你回想起第一个掰手指数数的下午，第一次看太空蚂蚁排队走路，你为什么记得这些？
t_en: Waves of memories gush into your mind, overloading your psyche. You recall the afternoon when you counted with your fingers for the first time in your life, and the first time you saw space ants walking in a straight line. Why do you remember these?

t_ch: 请别再继续问。
t_en: ...Please stop asking.

t_ch: 很有魅力。
t_en: They are charming.

t_ch: 怀念灰质的国度。
t_en: You are missing the country of gray matter.

t_ch: 「铭记这些垃圾让你感受自己活着。」你听见她冷哼一声，「信仰{RUBY_B#「记忆星神」}浮黎{RUBY_E#}，我们会焚烧你黯淡的记忆。」她说。
t_en: "Remembering the trash makes you feel alive." You catch her letting out an icy snort. "Worship {RUBY_B#Aeon of Remembrance} Fuli{RUBY_E#}, and we will burn your dull memories." She says.

t_ch: 你身处「西格玛星系联合剧院」的五号大厅。你不敢相信，自己坐在一群衣香鬓影的绅士与淑女之间。
t_en: You are in Hall No. 5 of the Sigma Galaxy United Theater. You find it hard to believe that you're sitting among a group of well-dressed and sophisticated ladies and gentlemen.

t_ch: 你开始期待，红鹅绒幕布之后的演出。你想，也许是萨尔索图歌剧团的宇宙公主，裙摆宽阔得可以笼罩住整个舞台。
t_en: You feel a buzz of anticipation for the show behind the red velvet curtains. You start picturing the Salsotto Troupe's cosmic princess, whose dress has a hem wide enough to cover the entire stage.

t_ch: 或是雅各宾数理院的老家伙们最爱的科学装置演出，他们将人工智能「普朗托专家系统」用于计算戏剧性情节。
t_en: Or it might be a scientific installation performance, the favorite of the old folks from the Jacobin School of Mathematics and Science. The Pronto Expert System, an AI device, is used to calculate the plot of the play.

t_ch: 或者，更伟大一点，西格玛圣女的不插电伴奏，那位永恒的「圣女」是拥有黄金比例的男性，世人都铭记他托举太阳的虬曲姿态。
t_en: Or, to be more mighty, the Sigma Maiden's unplugged accompaniment. That eternal "Maiden" is a man whose figure contains the Golden Ratio. His coiled posture when lifting the Sun is forever etched in the memory of the entire world.

t_ch: 很快，演出拉开帷幕——台上站着一位蓝色黏质皮肤的女士。她抬起手，开始歌唱——那是一种合成花腔。
t_en: Soon, the curtains are drawn. On the stage stands a lady with slimy blue skin. She lifts her hand and starts to sing with a synthesized coloratura.

t_ch: 你挺起胸膛，想活动僵硬的肌肉，却发现自己无法动弹——侧腰传来冰凉触感。是的…你确信…你被枪管抵住了。
t_en: You puff your chest out and try to move your tense muscles, but you find yourself unable to move — You feel something cold pressed against the side of your waist. Yes... you're very sure... that it is a gun.

t_ch: 「我们更换了节目单。『阿基维利』的时代落幕，古典艺术就已死去。今天大家都爱看动作片。告诉我你的选择。」一个男子声音传来。
t_en: "We've changed the program. The era of Akivili has ended, and classical arts are dead. Nowadays, action movies are the crowd-pleasers. Tell me your choice." A man's voice says.

t_ch: 我加入你们的行动。
t_en: I'll join you.

t_ch: 请放过我。
t_en: Please let me go.

t_ch: 「呃，不是这样的。」男子的声音有些茫然，他舔了舔嘴唇。「我的意思是，你喜欢歌舞片还是动作片？」
t_en: "Um, that's not what I meant." The man sounds bewildered. He licks his lips and continues. "I wanted to ask whether you prefer musicals or action movies."

t_ch: 你的腰椎被注射进药剂，一种宇宙和谐统一的喜乐贯穿你的脑髓。西利维亚小精灵围绕着你，他们吟唱颂歌。你跟着乐曲扭动着身体。
t_en: A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and a joy of universal harmony and unity shoots through your cerebral fluid. As the Silvia Spirits encircle you and start singing a hymn, you sway your body along with the music.

t_ch: 你的腰椎被注射进药剂，冷兵器与燃烧的子弹在你的脑髓里穿梭。爆炸的艺术宏伟瑰丽。你吸入化学废气，神清气爽。
t_en: A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and steel weapons and blazing bullets jet through your cerebral fluid. The art of explosion is spectacular. You breathe in the chemical exhaust gas, feeling refreshed.

t_ch: 「你…误会了。」他的声音变得急促，「这是互动戏剧，是戏剧性的一环。」
t_en: "You've... got the wrong idea." There is urgency in his voice. "You're watching an interactive play. This is a part of the show."

t_ch: 你的腰椎被注射进药剂，一种宇宙和谐统一的喜乐贯穿你的脑髓，无数冷兵器与燃烧的子弹在其中穿梭。
t_en: A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and a joy of universal harmony and unity shoots through your cerebral fluid. Countless steel weapons and blazing bullets flying through your psyche.

t_ch: 「互动戏剧，这是剧目情节中的一环。我们希望从中看到艺术的现代性——打破第四堵墙。我的业务还不太熟练，非常抱歉。」
t_en: "This is an interactive play. This is a part of the show. We hope to perceive the modernity of art through it — to break the fourth wall. I don't have a lot of experience with this job yet. I'm very sorry."

t_ch: 「很抱歉给您带来了过于真实的体验。互动环节已经结束，请继续安心观赏剧目。」
t_en: "We're sorry for providing an overly realistic experience for you. The interactive part has now ended. Please continue enjoying the show."

t_ch: 你身处无垠草原，白云点缀蓝天——一切都是*像素*绘制。你低头看自己的双手，它们变成了像素方块。
t_en: You are in a vast grassland and the sky is speckled with clouds. Everything is a "pixel" drawing. You look down at your hands and find them to be pixelated cubes.

t_ch: 你手腕戴着一块像素手表。你用变成一个像素点的大拇指摁了摁它——「砰」地一声，你为自己切换了一套背带裤。
t_en: You are wearing a pixel watch on your wrist. With your pixelated thumb, you press down on the watch. With a bang, your clothes change into overalls.

t_ch: 你看着空中浮动的像素砖块，耳边回响复古电子乐。一群像素蚂蚁在地上爬行，它们摆出了几个字「欢迎吉巴欧萝卜先生」。
t_en: You stare at the pixel blocks floating in the air as vintage electronic music plays in the background. A group of pixel ants crawls on the ground in a formation that reads, "Welcome, Mr. Jibaou the radish."

t_ch: 什么是吉巴欧萝卜先生？
t_en: Who is Mr. Jibaou the radish?

t_ch: 我是萝卜？
t_en: I'm a radish?

t_ch: 蚂蚁很快摆出了几个像素字「那就是你呀！」你决定不再理会这些蚂蚁。你在一朵飘来的像素云上看到几个蜡笔字「黑塔制造」。
t_en: The ants quickly form several pixel characters that read, "That's you!" You decide to ignore the ants. On a pixel cloud that drifts in your direction, you see some words written with crayons: "Produced by Herta."

t_ch: 你明白，是奇物「降维骰子」攻击了你。你身处模拟宇宙墙壁上的涂鸦里——黑塔随手创作的蜡笔画。
t_en: You realize you've been attacked by the Curio "Dice of Dimensionality Reduction." You are now a part of the graffiti — casually drawn by Herta with crayons — on the wall of the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 你气急败坏地踢了一脚砖块，冒出来一块像素金币。
t_en: You kick a brick in exasperation, and a pixel Gold Coin emerges.

t_ch: 你想弄明白如何回到模拟宇宙。你可以从左边的管道爬出去，或者跳上右边的砖块。
t_en: You want to figure out how to get back to the Simulated Universe. You may climb out from the pipe on your left, or hop onto the brick on your right.

t_ch: 你吃到了一块开拓者留下的金币。这块金币一分为二，接着二分为四，不停分裂、增殖……你拥有了意外的财富。
t_en: You have eaten a Gold Coin left behind by a Trailblazer. The Gold Coin splits into two, then into four. It constantly divides and proliferates... giving you a surprising windfall.

t_ch: 你遇到了地火组织的大块头，他看上去和这个世界的画风格格不入。他摆出了拳击姿势，并大叫着「KO」！很可惜，你没能躲过他的一拳。
t_en: You run into a brawny man from Wildfire who looks out of place with the artstyle of this world. He strikes a boxing pose and yells "KO!" Unfortunately, you fail to dodge his punch.

t_ch: 你继续前进，遇到了一个像素问号，你把帽子挂在它上面，显然这是存档点——下次再继续玩。
t_en: You proceed and see a pixel question mark on which you hang your hat. Obviously, this is a save point. You can continue the game later.

t_ch: 你遇见了一只三等身人形玩偶，它有稻草般的麻绳头发，肚子上有一个计数器。
t_en: You encounter a doll whose body is three times as tall as its head. It has straw-like hair made of ropes and a counter on its stomach.

t_ch: 你打开它的说明书「阿哈按照祂的样子制成的发泄玩偶——祂希望看到自己被暴揍的样子。揍得越凶他越开心，就会给您越多金币奖励！注：质量品控与阿哈本人无关。」
t_en: You open its manual, which reads, "This is a doll to vent extreme emotions on, made by Aha in THEIR own likeness. THEY wish to see THEMSELF beaten up. The worse the beating is, the happier THEY will get, and the more Gold Coins THEY will award you! Note: Aha is not involved in the quality control process."

t_ch: 阿哈玩偶毫无反应，计数器上的数字没有跳转。你太逊了！
t_en: Aha's doll does not react, and the number on the counter remains unchanged. You suck!

t_ch: 计数器缓慢跳转到「<unbreak>150</unbreak>」。玩偶内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「毁灭像个疯子，存护是个呆子；星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」
t_en: The number on the counter slowly reaches <unbreak>150</unbreak>. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."

t_ch: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
t_en: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.

t_ch: 阿哈玩偶被你打爆了——它碎成几块躺在地上。内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」
t_en: You punch Aha's doll into pieces that scatter across the ground. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."

t_ch: 你一无所获。
t_en: You gain nothing.

t_ch: 阿哈玩偶的计数器数字跳转，它达到了<unbreak>299</unbreak>。再来一下？你生活里需要发泄的地方太多了。
t_en: The number on the Aha doll's counter reaches <unbreak>299</unbreak>. One more? There is so much frustration in your life, after all.

t_ch: 计数器继续跳转，最后停留在了「<unbreak>400</unbreak>」上。玩偶内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；毁灭像个疯子，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」
t_en: The number on the counter continues going up until it stops at <unbreak>400</unbreak>. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."

t_ch: 你获得大量宇宙碎片。
t_en: You have obtained a large number of Cosmic Fragments.

t_ch: 阿哈玩偶的计数器疯狂跳转，它的数值膨胀至<unbreak>2147483647</unbreak>时突然跳转至了0，数据溢出了。你鄙视在如今使用<unbreak>32</unbreak>位int类型储存数据的制造商。
t_en: The number on the counter increases rapidly. When it reaches <unbreak>2147483647</unbreak>, it suddenly shifts to zero — This is an integer overflow. You spite the manufacturers who are still using <unbreak>32</unbreak>-bit systems to store data in the modern world.

t_ch: 你一无所获。
t_en: You gain nothing.

t_ch: 玩偶的脑袋炸开了花！<unbreak>500</unbreak>宇宙碎片掉落了出来。
t_en: The head of the doll has blown up! <unbreak>500</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments fall out from it.

t_ch: 玩偶突然转过头看你——它伸手从你口袋里抢走了一半宇宙碎片。
t_en: The doll suddenly turns to look at you. It reaches for your pocket and snatches half of your Cosmic Fragments.

t_ch: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片和祝福。
t_en: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments and Blessings.

t_ch: 你获得了大量宇宙碎片和祝福。
t_en: You have obtained a large number of Cosmic Fragments and Blessings.

t_ch: 星际和平公司的董事会理事「疤眼夫人」坐在你对面。她的左眼有一道狭长的疤，你感受到她正观察你，你知道她并不好惹。
t_en: Madam Scarred Eye, board member of the IPC, sits across from you. A long and narrow scar cuts through her left eye. You can sense her gaze on you, and you know she is not to be trifled with.

t_ch: 迫于她强大的威慑力，你坐在这里。一位女佣递上香槟，轻吻疤眼夫人的手背。
t_en: You are sitting here because of her overwhelming intimidation. A maid offers her a glass of champagne, and softly kisses the back of her hand.

t_ch: 「埃维利星球遭遇了金融危机。」疤眼夫人说，「业务巩固部准备帮助星球度过难关，我们推出了天使型谢债发行机，我会给你开个无法拒绝的条件。」
t_en: "The planet Evelli is hit by a financial crisis," Madam Scarred Eye announces. "To help them tide over, our Business Consolidation Department has launched the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. I'll make you an irresistible offer."

t_ch: 「购买公司的债务，等待这场浩劫过去，公司就会给予你数十倍的回馈。」
t_en: "Buy the IPC's debt, wait for this catastrophe to be over, and the IPC will pay you an amount more than ten times your principal."

t_ch: 疤眼夫人身旁的佣人推出一个长着翅膀的机器天使。「天使型谢债发行机，你需要定期把口袋里的金币喂给它。它会记录你的投资。投资周期结束，它会给你数十倍回馈。」
t_en: The servant next to Madam Scarred Eye pushes out a robot angel with wings. "This is the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. You need to feed Gold Coins into it regularly, and it will keep a record of your investment. At the end of the investment term, it will pay you an amount more than ten times your principal."

t_ch: 「你不知道你错过了什么。」疤眼夫人说。「每一个工人，都会激动地把握住这个机会。这是一个*投机主义*的时代。」
t_en: "You have no idea what you have missed out on," Madam Scarred Eye remarks. "Every worker would be thrilled to be given such an opportunity. After all, this is an 'era of opportunism'."

t_ch: 「我们可以解决你的匮乏——给你一个*机会*，得到你想要的东西。」疤眼夫人说。
t_en: "We can solve your deprivation by offering you a 'chance' to get what you want," Madam Scarred Eye adds.

t_ch: 「当然。你的投资回报率会达到十倍以上。只要你确定，你的匮乏来自于*物质*。克里珀庇佑着我们。」疤眼夫人说。
t_en: "Of course. Your return on investment will be above <unbreak>1000%</unbreak>, as long as you are certain that your deprivation is in terms of 'materialism'. Qlipoth blesses us." Madam Scarred Eye states.

t_ch: 「当然。爱可以作为宇宙通用货币，我们量产它。星际和平公司会致力于为众人提供永无止尽的爱，克里珀庇佑着我们。」疤眼夫人说。
t_en: "Of course. Love can be a universal currency, and it is something we mass-produce. The Interastral Peace Corporation endeavors to provide everyone with an endless supply of love. Qlipoth blesses us." Madam Scarred Eye states.

t_ch: 「有一天你会回来找我。」疤眼夫人缓慢地说，仿佛在对你下达命令。「如果客户们什么也不想要，贸易就无法继续。贸易的兴盛会为克里珀筑起更高的墙，这就是意义。赠给你些纪念品，期待与你下次见面。」她站起身，背对着你离开。
t_en: "One day, you'll come back to me," Madam Scarred Eye slowly asserts in an authoritative tone. "Trade stops when clients desire nothing. When trade is booming, it will allow Qlipoth to build higher walls. That is the purpose. Here are some complimentary gifts for you. I look forward to meeting you again." She stands up and turns her back to you as she leaves.

t_ch: 「有一天你会回来找我。」疤眼夫人缓慢地说，仿佛在对你下达命令。「如果客户们什么也不想要，贸易就无法继续。贸易的兴盛会为克里珀筑起更高的墙，这就是意义。赠给你些纪念品，期待与你下次见面。」她站起身，背对着你离开。
t_en: "One day, you'll come back to me," Madam Scarred Eye slowly asserts in an authoritative tone. "Trade stops when clients desire nothing. When trade is booming, it will allow Qlipoth to build higher walls. That is the purpose. Here are some complimentary gifts for you. I look forward to meeting you again." She stands up and turns her back to you as she leaves.

t_ch: 星际和平公司的董事会理事「疤眼夫人」坐在你对面，她的左眼有一道狭长的疤，你感受到她正观察你。
t_en: Madam Scarred Eye, board member of the IPC, sits across from you. A long and narrow scar cuts through her left eye. You can sense her gaze on you.

t_ch: 「你回来了。我知道我不会等太久。」她看到你，双手交叉靠在下颚，丝毫不感到意外。
t_en: "You're back. I knew you wouldn't make me wait too long." She puts her chin on her crossed fingers, not at all surprised by your visit.

t_ch: 「天使型谢债发行机，定期把口袋里的金币喂给它。它会记录你的投资。周期结束，它会给你数十倍的回馈。」
t_en: "This is the Angel-type I.O.U. Dispenser. You need to feed Gold Coins into it regularly, and it will keep a record of your investment. At the end of the investment term, it will pay you an amount ten times your principal."

t_ch: 在伊须磨洲红岩石中间，你发现了一冢白石人头雕像，它的大小可以被手掌握住。你阅读石台刻字，上述其为{RUBY_B#「丰饶星神」}药师{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: In between the red rocks in Insumousu, you discover the white stone sculpture of a human head. Its size is just right to be held in your fist. You read the inscription on the stone platform that says, "{RUBY_B#Aeon of Abundance} Yaoshi{RUBY_E#}."

t_ch: 一股冲动上涌，你伸手握住雕像。你感到它在手中变为一只鸟，它的长寿以具象化的形式增生、膨胀，接着，赭红液体从你的指缝里流下来。
t_en: On the spur of the moment, you wrap your fingers around the sculpture, feeling it transforming into a bird in your hand. Its longevity proliferates and expands in a visualized form. Then, scarlet liquid flows through your fingers.

t_ch: 「…令诸有情…所求皆得…折磨治愈…互为共生……」
t_en: "...All sentient beings... will have all their wishes fulfilled... torment and healing... are in a symbiotic relationship..."

t_ch: 你不慎一脚踏入软木碎叶搭成的地面陷阱中——你相信这是布莱德星最*老式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。你站起身，面前有一个巢穴入口。
t_en: You accidentally step into a ground trap made of branches and leaves — the type you believe to be used only by the most old-fashioned hunter on planet Bled. You get to your feet, and the entrance of a nest is before you.

t_ch: 你慢慢地深入虫巢。你拨开倒悬的虫卵，惊奇发现半透明的虫泡中，新生命正用触须挠它还未睁开的复眼。
t_en: Slowly, you make your way into the insect nest. As you brush off the eggs hanging upside down from the roof, you discover to your amazement that newborns within the translucent egg sacs are scratching their still unopened compound eyes with their antennae.

t_ch: 你发现了尽头惊异的景象，在数以百计的*虫泡*堆起的王座上，祂昏沉地睡在那里。
t_en: You find an astonishing sight at the end of the nest. On a throne atop a pile of hundreds of "egg sacs," "THEY" are sleeping soundly.

t_ch: 你眨了下眼，时间流逝了一天。你感到自己正一次又一次观看「虫皇」塔伊兹育罗斯睡在那里，你希望祂睁开眼看你。
t_en: A day passes when you blink once. You feel you are looking at the sleeping form of Tayzzyronth, the Imperator Insectorum, over and over, hoping that THEY will open THEIR eyes and look at you.

t_ch: 第一个虫泡轻轻破裂，生命迎来绽开时刻。
t_en: The first egg sac softly ruptures, and new life blooms.

t_ch: 你抱起扁圆状的虫泡，它的养料漏出，就像一粒开了口的绿细胞。它扭动着虬曲的身体，钻进了你的皮肤里。
t_en: When you lift the flat, round-shaped egg sack with your hands, its nutrients leak out like a punctured green cell. Then, it wriggles its curved body into your skin.

t_ch: 很快，你的脑袋里开始出现声音……塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯██……漫长的等待摧毁了你，你慌忙逃离。
t_en: Soon, a voice begins to ring in your head... Tay█zzy█ ██ro█n█ █th██... The long wait destroyed you, and you flee in a hurry.

t_ch: 你相信，你的人生不需要探险。…当然更重要的是，你害怕在虫巢里直面塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯██ 的█ █子嗣███ ████……
t_en: You believe your life doesn't need adventures... More importantly, you dread to face Tay█zzy█ ██ro█n█ █th██'s █ █childre███ ████...

t_ch: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
t_en: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.

t_ch: 你闻到一股并不冷峻的糕点香氛——你的目光落至面前的一盏芸豆糕点，上缀有惊惶鹿花朵。
t_en: You catch a whiff of the aroma of warm pastries. Your eyes fall on a bean pastry adorned with Startled Deer petals.

t_ch: 你继续追寻着这股味道——你抬头，发现一位黑发女子站在你面前。她吮着食指上残留的糕泥，你能嗅到她唇齿留有的香味。
t_en: You continue to trace the source of the aroma. As you look up, you find a dark-haired lady standing in front of you. You can smell the residual aroma on her lips while she licks the bits of pastry stuck on her fingers.

t_ch: 你是谁？
t_en: Who are you?

t_ch: 你是黑塔的另一个人偶？
t_en: Are you another puppet of Herta's?

t_ch: 「黑塔邀请我参与这个项目，培育宇宙。」她摇头。「我和她可不一样。虽然在很多地方，我和黑塔很像是知己…但总的来说，我们没什么交情。」
t_en: "Herta invited me to participate in this project and nurture the universe." She shakes her head. "I'm different from her. Although we appear like the best of friends in many aspects... the truth is, we aren't that close with each other."

t_ch: 这是哪里？
t_en: What is this place?

t_ch: 「模拟实验室，我的微型培养皿。」她皱眉。
t_en: "This is the simulated lab, my miniature petri dish." She says with a frown.

t_ch: 「我独自培育这个微型切片，把它嵌在了模拟宇宙的代码里。」她抚摸自己围巾上的刺绣，漫不经心。「别告诉黑塔和螺丝咕姆。」
t_en: "I nurtured this miniature slice by myself and embedded it into the code of the Simulated Universe." She strokes the embroidery on her scarf distractedly as she adds, "Don't tell Herta and Screwllum about this."

t_ch: 你和黑塔的代码有哪里不一样？
t_en: What's the difference between your code and Herta's?

t_ch: 「黑塔，她喜欢做一些新奇的系统和小玩意。」她说。「我培育宇宙和星神原体。」
t_en: "Herta has a thing for inventing quirky systems and gadgets, while I nurture the prototypes of the universe and the Aeons." She answers.

t_ch: 你们都很爱玩小把戏。
t_en: Both of you like to pull off little tricks.

t_ch: 「闯进我的切片概率极小，高兴一些吧，我会给你些东西。」她说。「厉害的东西，但不免费。」
t_en: "The chance of breaching into my slice is slim, so you should be happy about this. I'll give you some things," she says, "good things. But they don't come for free."

t_ch: 你漫步于希斯拉达恩部落的荒原，三只外形像猪的胆小序列生物撞见了你。它们反应各不相同：一只瑟瑟发抖，一只准备逃跑，一只摆出战斗姿势。
t_en: Three timid sequence creatures that resemble a pig bump into you as you wander across the wilderness where the Hithradahn people dwell. They react differently to your presence: One is trembling, one is ready to flee, and one is in a combat position.

t_ch: 你记得星际和平指南上的描述：它们的名字叫「序列扑满」，跨维度生物，一生中大部分时间，花在进食和逃跑。
t_en: You remember the description written in the Interastral Peace Guide. The creatures are called Sequence Trotters, and they are trans-latitudinal organisms. They spend most time of their lives eating and escaping.

t_ch: 遇见「序列扑满」是为吉兆。你开始思考如何应对：玩耍的规则，得根据每只扑满的性格定制。
t_en: Running into a Sequence Trotter is an auspicious sign. You start to think of a way to deal with them. The rules of the game must be fixed according to the personality of each Trotter.

t_ch: 这是哪里？…你喃喃自语。你掉入了无垠黑暗中，这里没有光线，方向无法辨寻。
t_en: "Where's this place?" You mumble to yourself. You plunge into the boundless darkness. There is no way to get your bearings as there is no light.

t_ch: 神秘的嗡鸣在你的耳边响起，巨大的吸力拉扯你。你的精神力变得异常懒散。环绕你的气流并无实体，你肌肉松懈，眼皮蜷缩…
t_en: An inscrutable humming rings next to your ears, and a tremendous force is pulling at you. Your mental prowess becomes unusually weak, and the air flowing around you is not of a material nature. Your muscles are relaxed, and your eyelids are drooping...

t_ch: 这是一个异常可怕的体验。虚无吞没了你，你慌忙逃窜。
t_en: This is an exceptionally terrifying experience. As Nihility engulfs you, you scramble to escape.

t_ch: 这是一个异常可怕的体验。虚无吞没了你，你感到自己被抽走了生命力。
t_en: This is an exceptionally terrifying experience. As Nihility engulfs you, you can feel your vitality being drained.

t_ch: 你遇见了萨尔维亚星虔诚的筑墙者大队。他们推着矿车，正为星球筑起高墙。你注意到一位女孩，她栗色头发反射着身后砂石的色彩。
t_en: You cross paths with a devout Wallbuilder brigade from Servia. They are pushing mine carts while building a high wall for the planet. A girl catches your eye. The color of the gravel behind her reflects on her chestnut hair.

t_ch: 她的双手捧着流光碎银的矿物质，里面是木料和黄金。一瞬间你看到她的眼睛，像是银河，闪亮的小玩意倾泻下来。
t_en: She is holding a heap of gleaming minerals with wood and gold mixed inside. You briefly catch sight of her eyes, from which sparkles pour down like galaxies.

t_ch: 她远远地向你开口：「克里珀注视着我们，祂的视线很温暖。你可以从多余的材料里挑选你喜欢的。」
t_en: She speaks to you from a distance, "Qlipoth is gazing at us with a warm look. You can pick whatever you like from the excess materials."

t_ch: 你踏入递归方程模拟的自然程序，一个黑匣子放在地上。你打开它，全息拟造出一位医师——他腰椎以下是蛇的身形。
t_en: You step into a natural program simulated by the recursive formula and notice a black box on the ground. You open it to reveal the holographic image of a physician — he has the body of a serpent below his waist.

t_ch: 他挪动蛇尾，墨绿鳞片窸窣，反射金属光泽。「嘶嘶——」他开口，联觉信标运作，你逐渐理解半蛇人语言。
t_en: His dark green scales rustle and reflect a metallic glint as he moves its tail. "Hiss..." He speaks. Thanks to the Synesthesia Beacon, you can slowly understand his language.

t_ch: 「天戈星在<unbreak>62</unbreak>光年外被『岚』的光矢摧毁。黑塔观测到这件事，并在模拟宇宙中培育我的精神体。」他手掌中捧起一团火种。
t_en: "Xuange was destroyed by Lan's Lux Arrow <unbreak>62</unbreak> light-years away. Herta observed the incident and nurtured my spiritual form in the Simulated Universe." A kindling emerges in the physician's hands.

t_ch: 「我的存在即是虚无…我没有权限终止黑匣。我尝试翻越防护，仅做到将自灭火种传至黑匣外。希望你接收它，贯彻我的信念。」
t_en: "My existence is Nihility... I do not have the authority to terminate the black box. I've tried to get out of the defensive walls, but I've only managed to send the self-extinguishing kindling outside the black box. I hope you can take it and see my belief through."

t_ch: 你来到瓦鲁尼习星球最热闹的夜市。你注意到一个摊位，头戴兜帽的生意人遮住了脸，他盘腿坐在紫色地垫上，身边陈列各类矿瓶。
t_en: You arrive at the busiest bazaar in Varunix. One of the stalls catches your attention. The stall owner's face is obscured by the hood he is wearing. He sits cross-legged on a purple floor mat with various mineral bottles displayed around him.

t_ch: 「我是奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德的徒弟。我们来自星际和平公司的信仰狂热部！」他不着调地说。「你知道银河里的贸易是如何产生的吗？」
t_en: "I'm the disciple of Oswaldo Schneider. Both of us are from the Fanaticism Department of IPC!" The man says out of nowhere. "Do you know how commercial activities in the cosmos started in the first place?"

t_ch: 为了赚星际货币。
t_en: It was to earn more galactic currencies.

t_ch: 懂经济学能挣钱吗？
t_en: Does the knowledge of economics help you earn money?

t_ch: 「当然。最初是源于我们对克里珀的追随——后援队为了帮助星神筑墙，从宇宙各地运输材料，这时候，我们学会资源交换。」他挠了挠脸颊，「现在，来尝试交换吧，我保证你的学费不会白交。」
t_en: "Of course. It all started from our belief in Qlipoth. To help the Aeon in building the wall, the support team needed materials from different places across the universe. We learned to exchange resources during that time," he says while scratching his face. "Now, let's try to exchange something. I guarantee you that whatever you've spent won't be in vain."

t_ch: 你又一次在夜市看到「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德」的徒弟，你嗅到他的贪婪——他选用批发矿瓶来节省成本，周身散发着硫磺气味。
t_en: Once again, you bump into Oswaldo Schneider's disciple at the bazaar. You can smell his greed — he reeks of sulfur as he uses wholesale mineral bottles to save costs.

t_ch: 「差价就是学费，人人都逃不了交学费。贸易的第一条准则，就是低买高卖。学会这条，你以后都不会吃亏。」他满不在意。
t_en: "The price difference is the fees you have to pay for the lesson, and no one can be the exception. The rule of thumb in business is to buy low and sell high. Master it, and you will never suffer a loss in the future," he says indifferently.

t_ch: 「接下来我教你如何掌握消费者心理。这涉及到概率学，人人都会对超级大乐透感兴趣。我保证，你总会有一天开到超级大奖。」
t_en: "Now, let me teach you a thing or two about consumer psychology, which involves probability theory. A jackpot with a huge prize is irresistible to most people. I guarantee that you will strike the jackpot one day."

t_ch: 你又一次看到「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德」的徒弟。他看上去苍老了许多，瓦鲁尼习星球的经济遭遇寒潮，夜市贸易已变得冷清，顾客门可罗雀。
t_en: Once again, you bump into Oswaldo Schneider's disciple at the bazaar. He looks like he has aged a lot. The economy on Varunix is in recession, and the bazaar is quiet and deserted.

t_ch: 「啊…没错。在上一个超级好宝贝游戏里，随机库中其实并没有大奖。」他愧疚地说。
t_en: "Ah... You're right. There was no prize in the random pool of the previous Super Goodies game." He concedes guiltily.

t_ch: 「但是，我保证我会给你的。你信任过我，是老客户。接下来我要教会你贸易的最后一条准则：永远不消耗自己的信用。」他呲牙笑。
t_en: "But I promise I'll give it to you, as you trust me and are my regular customer. Next, I'll teach you the last rule of business: Never lie to your customers." He grins.

t_ch: 你走进庇尔波因特星球最可爱的奇力罗鱼鲜食馆——由一个巨大鱼眼气泡构成。你隔着弧形玻璃能看到亚空障壁。你享受午后惬意阳光，只属于你的时刻。
t_en: You walk into the most adorable Kiliro Fish Restaurant on Pier Point — a place made of a giant bubble in the shape of a fish eye. Through the curved glass, you can see the subspace barrier. You have a good time in the pleasant afternoon sunshine.

t_ch: 所有顾客都沉浸在超声鱼波的脑筋膜按摩之中。你一口吞下盘子里的*鱼眼*，感受社会性梦境袭来——庇尔波因特星球迎来黎明发展期，天空中定期会下星际货币雨，你手握公司发售的债券，幸福正在增值。
t_en: While the other customers are enjoying the piscatorial ultrasonic wave cerebral fascia massage, you stuff a fish eye into your mouth and plunge into a social dreamland. Pier Point is seeing a period of development during which the galactic currency will be raining down regularly from the sky. You are thrilled, as you own the IPC's bonds.

t_ch: 你的胃黏膜将鱼眼消耗殆尽，你从梦中醒来。你发现上班的时间已经到了。但你还不愿离开…
t_en: Your mind returns to reality when the fish eye is fully digested in your stomach. It's time for you to go to work, but you are reluctant to move...

t_ch: 你走进莱顿宁星球昏暗的汽车旅馆。在楼梯口，有位硕大的客人令你害怕——它的身体由透明胶液构成，两只头正互相碰撞，一只长着红色触角，一只带有白色光圈。
t_en: You enter a dimly-lit motel on Layton. At the stairway, you meet a massive guest who looks intimidating. Its body is formed by a transparent gel-like substance, and it has two heads knocking each other — one of them has red antennae, while the other has a white halo.

t_ch: 你对于这位邻居感到害怕，你似乎必须在它的两种人格中做出选择。
t_en: You find your neighbor terrifying. It seems like you have to choose between its two personalities.

t_ch: 「我们叫萨里奥。萨里哥哥是莱顿宁恶魔，而里奥弟弟是莱顿宁天使。你要和谁当邻居？」
t_en: "Our name is Saleo. Sal, the older one, is the demon. Leo, the younger one, is the angel. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"

t_ch: 在汽车旅馆的地下室，你又一次遇到了萨里——它的脑袋上有红色*恶魔*触角，黏质身体正腐蚀吞噬旅馆里的地板、墙壁，它并不很想理你，看上去它正忙于不断膨胀。
t_en: In the motel basement, you run into Sal again. He has a pair of red devilish antennae on his head, and his sticky body is corroding the tiles and the walls of the motel. He doesn't pay you any attention, as he is too busy expanding his size.

t_ch: 每个房间内都没有动静，你怀疑其他屋内的旅客究竟是还在自己的床上，还是已经在它的胃里…你有些懊悔自己之前的选择。
t_en: Not a sound can be heard from every other room. You wonder whether the other guests are all in bed or whether they are in Sal's stomach... You can't help but regret your previous choice.

t_ch: 「我叫萨里，是恶魔，我的弟弟则是莱顿宁天使，你要和谁当邻居？」
t_en: "I'm Sal, a devil. My brother is an angel. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"

t_ch: 在汽车旅馆的公共洗浴间，你又一次遇到了里奥——它的头上长出一只白色*天使*圆环，身体由乳白色胶液构成，小小的触手上捧着一本书，它向你微笑。
t_en: In the common bathroom of the motel, you run into Leo again. He has a white angel halo on his head, and his body is made up of white gel. Holding a book with his tiny tentacles, he smiles at you.

t_ch: 接着，它用古怪声音宣读幸福理论，附近住客从窗户里探出头来听。你突然意识到，所有顾客都被它宣读的教义蛊惑了心智…
t_en: Using an aberrant voice, he starts reciting the theory of happiness. The guests nearby all stick their heads out to listen. Suddenly, you realize that the guests are all brainwashed by his recitation...

t_ch: 「我叫里奥，是天使。我的哥哥则是莱顿宁恶魔，你要和谁当邻居？」
t_en: "I'm Leo, an angel. My brother is a devil. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"

t_ch: 你走在雪原里，裹紧身上温暖的皮毛。你迎面遇到一位男士——他有着红色卷发和雀斑，身材高瘦，穿着小牛皮靴，扛着猎枪。
t_en: You wander on the snow plains wrapped tightly in a fur coat. A man is coming your way. The tall and slender man has crimson curly hair and a freckled face. He is wearing leather boots and holding a rifle.

t_ch: 他指着远方球形建筑物「星际和平公司的制药公司在斯诺德兰捕猎生物材料，制作珍贵药品，招募大量赏金猎人。」
t_en: He points at a spherical building in the distance and says, "The pharmaceutical branch of the IPC is hunting biological materials to manufacture precious drugs, and so are recruiting bounty hunters in the Snowland."

t_ch: 「秘密情报，S级招募——雪原深境牦牛，极高报酬。这里竟然这么冷，能借我你的皮毛吗？」你目光落在他胸前*斯诺德兰动物保护协会*的徽章…
t_en: "According to a secret source, the S-rank bounty for Snow Plains Yaks comes with a handsome reward. I'm surprised by how cold this place is. Could you lend me your fur coat?" You catch sight of the Snowland Animal Welfare Association badge worn on the man's chest...

t_ch: 「出了个小意外，不过问题不大。」黑塔的声音突然传来，你找不到声音的来源。「系统里一部分球形代码产生了熵增，常有的事。」
t_en: "There is a small glitch, but it can be easily taken care of." It's Herta's voice, sourceless, ephemeral. "Entropy appeared in some spherical codes in the system. It is a common occurrence."

t_ch: 「它们很混乱，我就干脆把这团代码装起来，塞在了奇物里。」黑塔说。「把它带着，暂时会给让你的行为记录产生偏差，但我很快就会修好它。」
t_en: "The bundle of codes was a mess, so I packed it up and stuffed it into a Curio," Herta says. "Carrying it around will cause a deviation in your behavioral record, but I will fix it in no time."

t_ch: 阳光烤灼大地，你嚼着草叶，迎面走来一群壮汉——他们是肆意作乱的街头强盗，身后跟着一群雇佣军队。
t_en: You are grazing grass on the sun-baked earth when a bunch of beefy guys comes your way. They are the street bandits who wreak havoc wherever they go. They are followed by a team of mercenaries.

t_ch: 「我们是最后的牛仔！」首领振臂高呼，红鹮袖章象征他们已归顺皇室，你相信，他们就是*皇家*强盗。
t_en: "We're the last cowboys!" Shouts the leader who flails his arms happily. The red ibis armbands indicate their submission to the royal family. You believe they are the royal bandits.

t_ch: 「留下你的金币。城邦建设需要资金，慷慨是最后的牛仔精神！」强盗恬不知耻。你瞪着他们，狠狠咬断嘴里的草叶根——
t_en: "Leave your gold coins behind. We need funds to oil the development of the city. Generosity is in line with the cowboy's spirit!" Scowling at the shameless bandits, you bite off the grass with your mouth...

t_ch: 你面前的星体计算机正在高速运算，它上身是曲面屏幕，下身是无性别人类身体。它似乎在模拟大质量恒星的塌缩，只有你知道，你们的博弈，是一局石头剪刀布。
t_en: The astral computer before you, with a curved screen on top and a genderless human body at the bottom, is running a calculation at a high speed. While it seems to be simulating the collapse of a massive star, only you know that you are playing a game of rock-paper-scissors with it.

t_ch: 「你有<unbreak>82.49%</unbreak>的概率会在第一局就出石头，<unbreak>94.61%</unbreak>的概率在第二局出剪刀。」星体计算机说，「如果你选择现在掀桌与我生成的怪物战斗，你有<unbreak>99.37%</unbreak>的概率会输。」
t_en: "There is an <unbreak>82.49%</unbreak> chance of you playing rock in the first game, and a <unbreak>94.61%</unbreak> of you playing scissors in the second. If you choose to flip the table with me and battle with the monsters I created, there is a <unbreak>99.37%</unbreak> of you losing."

t_ch: 「如果你留下宇宙碎片，则有<unbreak>100%</unbreak>的概率会生还。」它正等待你的反应。
t_en: "But if you leave some Cosmic Fragments behind, your chance of survival is <unbreak>100%</unbreak>." It is waiting for your response.

t_ch: 你坐在牌桌前，独眼荷官的金属义腿与尼尔迪斯牌桌腿交缠在一起，躯干于桌洞正中央伫立，弹球围绕他的腰间转圈。
t_en: You sit at the card table across from a one-eyed dealer whose metal prosthetic legs are intertwined with the legs of the Nildis table. His torso runs through a hole in the center of the table with a pinball circling his waist.

t_ch: 他转动眼球，看向你，绅士地鞠躬。接着，荷官以十支机械手臂分发筹码，优雅切牌。
t_en: He moves his eyeballs to look at you before bowing at you gentlemanly. Next, the dealer distributes the chips and shuffles the cards gracefully with his ten mechanical arms.

t_ch: 「一定概率，您将翻开世上最美妙的记忆。」荷官将一叠牌发到你的面前。「您也可能会翻到一些隐秘的、不能被知晓的事情。如果您运气糟糕，后果将很危险。」
t_en: "There is a certain chance that you will unfold the most wonderful memory of the world." The dealer deals a stack of cards to you and adds, "However, you might also reveal some mysterious affairs that aren't supposed to be made known. If you are unlucky, the consequences will be dire."

t_ch: 你睁开眼，巨大的灯鱼从你手边游过，眼前埃勒庇努群岛水底最美的珊瑚正抖动它的礁角，星芒碎片四处流溢，你伸手去接……
t_en: You open your eyes to see a gigantic lightfish swimming past you. There are magnificent corals under the water of Alepine Islands, and their reefs are swaying. You reach your hand toward the starlight fragments drifting in your surroundings...

t_ch: 你获得了1个祝福。
t_en: You obtained 1 Blessing.

t_ch: 你骑在斯诺德兰野猪背上遍游草原！它正发疯驰骋，你在它的背上咯咯发笑，它想甩开你，这令你更开心！你俯身拉紧牵绳，却发现它驮的布袋里有不少好宝贝…
t_en: You are traveling across a grassland on the back of a Snowland Wildboar! You laugh giddily while it gallops at full tilt. The harder it tries to get rid of you, the more delighted you are! As you lean down to pull the rein, you notice a satchel full of little treasures...

t_ch: 你获得了1个奇物。
t_en: You have obtained 1 Curio.

t_ch: 你跟随在淘金机器人身后潜入山洞，它的探灯照到一处裂缝，钻头开始高速运转，你看到被凿开的地下，源源不断地涌出令人激动的金币……
t_en: You follow a gold-panning robot and sneak into a cave. The robot aims its headlight at a crevice, and its drill bit starts running at high speed. To your excitement, gold coins come gushing out non-stop from underground through the crack...

t_ch: 你获得了一些宇宙碎片。
t_en: You have obtained some Cosmic Fragments.

t_ch: 你睁开眼，发现眼前仍然是熟悉景象。「你翻开了一张空白牌，虽然概率不高，但也是结果中的一种。」荷官说道。
t_en: You open your eyes and find that nothing has changed. "You've drawn a blank card. The chance of drawing one is low, but it is still one of the possible outcomes," The dealer explains.

t_ch: 你一无所获。
t_en: You gain nothing.

t_ch: 「还要继续翻吗？」
t_en: "Do you want to draw more cards?"

t_ch: 你睡得迷糊不清，空气非常沉闷。你满头大汗，挣扎着无法醒来。你在空中听到一个声音，它在梦里对你呓语：「…星核…将完成你的…任何愿望…」
t_en: You are in a deep slumber. The air is stuffy, and your forehead is covered with beads of sweat. As hard as you try, you are unable to wake up. Just then, a voice comes from the sky and whispers to you in your dream, "...The Stellaron... will fulfill... any wish of yours..."

t_ch: 「我非常抱歉。」你的记忆被打断。你抬头，看到荷官十支机械手臂缠绞在一起，组成旋转矩阵，重力波正在汇聚成子弹，你已经成为他的敌人。
t_en: "I'm very sorry." Your memory has been interrupted. You look up at the dealer, whose ten arms twist together, forming a spinning matrix and making bullets by converging the gravitational waves.

t_ch: 你获得了1个组件。
t_en: You obtained 1 component.

t_ch: 你来到一个埃尔韦风味小酒馆，这里气氛十分快活。
t_en: You reach an Elway-style tavern with a lively atmosphere.

t_ch: 你要了一杯酒，马里亚香橙和棕榈肉桂调成的。你观察人群，他们戴着面具，身材体格各异——「假面愚者」聚集的酒馆。
t_en: You order a cocktail concocted with Marian oranges and palm cinnamon. Then, you observe the crowd. Everyone is wearing a mask and has different body sizes. From this, you know it is a tavern where the Masked Fools gather.

t_ch: 「欢迎来到『世界尽头』酒馆。」酒侍布拉琪，向诸位深深鞠躬，「只接待有幽默感的顾客。」
t_en: "Welcome to Tavern World's End." Bragi, the bartender, bows deeply to the patrons and continues, "We only serve customers with a sense of humor."

t_ch: 「我们遵循阿哈的意志，接下来要寻点乐子。现在加入擂台的是弗朗斯先生，他带着他的专属安保集团。」酒侍说道，「另一边是亚威拉壮汉，他的佣兵集团块头很大，不可小觑！」
t_en: "In keeping with Aha's will, we will have some fun next. Mr. France and his team of bodyguards will be the next to join the arena. His opponent will be Avila. He and his mercenaries are burly and not to be underestimated!"

t_ch: 「还有谁要来？谁还能打第<unbreak>78201</unbreak>场！」
t_en: "Who else is coming? Who's up for the <unbreak>78,201</unbreak>st round?"

t_ch: 在翁瓦克岛，一群星际外来者拦住你——你打量着来人，这些家伙不属于这里。翁瓦克土著仍使用石器，而这群人全身裹着科技行星材料。
t_en: In Vonwacq, some outsiders block your path. You size them up and realize they aren't locals. While the Vonwacq still uses stone tools, these people are wearing materials from a technologically advanced planet.

t_ch: 「六十自然年的轮回又要来到，翁瓦克岛周期性魔王将从树上果实中诞育。我们的到来即是为了删除生物库中的数据——周期性魔王乃是一条外星虫子！」一位男士说道。
t_en: "The <unbreak>60</unbreak>-natural-year cycle is about to start again, and Vonwacq's Cyclic Demon Lord will be born from the fruit of a certain type of tree. We're here to wipe this data from the biological database, as the Cyclic Demon Lord is just an alien bug!" A man declared.

t_ch: 「果实中的魔王一旦落地，文明将遭受毁灭性打击。根据推算，我们离最后的时限还有四…四个周期！」另一位星际外来者的声音颤抖。
t_en: "Once the Demon Lord emerges from the fruit and lands on the ground, it will deal a devastating blow to our civilization. Calculations show that we are just f—f—four cycles away from its arrival!" Another outsider remarks in a trembling voice.

t_ch: 无名客的列车停靠布达安尔利站台，后厢上有无穷馈赠。戴着毛毡帽的旅行者靠在车厢前，他衣着破烂，毛靴沾着泥土。
t_en: The Express of the Nameless makes a stop at Budley with an abundance of gifts in its rear carriage. A traveler wearing a felt hat is leaning against the front of the carriage. His clothes are tattered and his boots mud-stained.

t_ch: 你走近车厢，他朝你招手。「阿基维利曾化身普通人，与布达安尔利人一起开拓冒险，我们交换旅程中的有趣经历。」
t_en: He approaches and waves at you. "Akivili had an adventure with us under the guise of a civilian. We exchanged a lot of fun experiences during the journey."

t_ch: 你走进圆形房间，绳索捆绑一株枝桠纯白的树。你惊讶于它的纯美，通体圣洁，它像一尊舞动雕像。
t_en: You enter a circular room where a tree with white branches is tied up in ropes. Its beauty and sacredness, which make it look like a dancing statue, blow you away.

t_ch: 你注意到树旁倚坐数名士兵，你不确定他们是否睡着了。他们是虔诚的骑士，每人的皮肤都不带血色。
t_en: Several soldiers are leaning against the tree, and you are not sure whether they are sleeping. They are pious knights with faces as pale as a sheet.

t_ch: 你也不受控制地走近它。你听到碎裂缓慢的树涛声。你看到树根旁的一块木牌：「用…浇灌…它将…盛开。」
t_en: You can't help moving closer to the tree. You hear the slow, crackling sound of the tree waving to and fro. There is a wooden board next to its roots that reads, "Water it... and it will... bloom."

t_ch: 你看见一只可爱的机器人向你招手。当你走近时，它开口了：「这里是星际和平公司销售终端！我们拥有你想要的一切！」在菜单里，你看见医疗、强化和购买业务，价格还算公道……
t_en: You see an adorable robot waving at you. When you get near it, it speaks: "This is an IPC point of sale! You can find everything you desire here!" On the menu, you see medical, enhancement, and purchasing services offered at affordable prices...

t_ch: 警告！你的行为触发了销售终端的「电击」！
t_en: Warning! Your actions have triggered electric shock from the sales terminal!

t_ch: 你在「哀恸洞穴」中被困已久…你逐渐变得胡子拉碴、眼神颓靡。倘若此时任谁到来帮助你，你都将其视之为「救赎」。
t_en: You have been stuck in the Mourning Cave for ages... You have become unkempt, with a weary look in your eyes. If anyone were to come and help you at this moment, you would see them as your salvation.

t_ch: 就在你思考是否要制造一个如同*信标着色剂*般鲜艳的醒目标识自救时，你听到了一阵古老而优美的歌谣——那声音犹如澄澈雨雾，仿若蜜茶浇灌着你。
t_en: As you are contemplating whether to save yourself by making an eye-catching sign as bright as the *Beacon Coloring Paste*, you hear an ancient and beautiful song - The song, as refreshing as the clear rain, soothes your soul like a pot of honey tea.

t_ch: 「遇到您这般坚韧的灵魂是我们的荣幸。我们是纯美骑士团——向您献出枪尖上的衷情。」一些骑士盔甲碰撞的声音传来，一阵幻晕的光辉将你笼罩…接着是巨大飞艇降落的声音。你的意识模糊，只听到他们纷杂议论如何将你救出…
t_en: "It's our honor to meet a soul as tenacious as yours. We are the Knights of Beauty, and we'll show you our passion through our spears." Along with the clanking sound of armor, a burst of dazzling light envelops you... You hear the sound of a descending massive airship. While drifting in and out of consciousness, you can only vaguely hear them discussing how to rescue you...

t_ch: 然而…这议论持续了很久。他们各自连声点头称赞，接着自报名讳，他们研究你的困境，并向你提供数十种针对性的「帮助」……境况的困惑程度如熵增愈发膨胀，你开始忧虑起他们是否可被信任。
t_en: Yet... the discussion lasts for a very long time. They shower you with praises before introducing themselves. After analyzing your predicament, they provide you with dozens of targeted solutions... You find the situation more and more confusing, and you start to wonder whether they can be trusted.

t_ch: 骑士为你献上一朵花。
t_en: The knight offers you a flower.

t_ch: 你接过它…「纯美」的花瓣感动了你。
t_en: You receive it... The petals of Beauty melt your heart.

t_ch: 骑士向你伸出一只手。
t_en: The knight extends a hand to you.

t_ch: 你抓住了那只手…传来的余温感动了你。
t_en: You grab that hand... The lingering body warmth melts your heart.

t_ch: 骑士向你发出赞美。
t_en: The knight offers you a praise.

t_ch: 你望向他，只可惜并未看到他的面容便昏了过去…等你从昏厥中醒来，身边已被骑士众人围绕。
t_en: You turn to him but pass out before you can see his face... When you regain consciousness, you are surrounded by the knights.

t_ch: 骑士的长发缓缓垂下。
t_en: The knight's long hair hangs down slowly.

t_ch: 你抓住了一缕长发…你很愧疚。
t_en: You catch a handful of long hair... and regret doing so.

t_ch: 骑士将圆盾给予你。
t_en: The knight gives you the round shield.

t_ch: 你感受圆盾的荣耀，骑士的「英勇」震撼了你。
t_en: You can feel the glory from the shields, and you are shaken by the valor of the knights.

t_ch: 骑士向你伸出一只圆手。
t_en: The knight extends a spherical hand to you.

t_ch: 你判断了一番哪里是它的手指…但你握住了它的手。
t_en: After assessing the position of its fingers... you hold its hand in the end.

t_ch: 骑士深情地呼唤你。
t_en: The knight calls to you fondly.

t_ch: 你回应了呼唤…那声音十分虔诚。
t_en: You answer the call... The voice sounds very pious.

t_ch: 骑士向你放出一名伙伴。
t_en: The knight gives you a companion.

t_ch: 哇！你驾驭了一名伙伴！你从半空中呼啸着落下！
t_en: Wow! You're riding a companion and swooping down from the sky!

t_ch: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。他们忧虑地担心你缺少宇宙碎片…
t_en: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. They are worried that you might not have enough Cosmic Fragments...

t_ch: 纯美骑士把身上所剩无几的宇宙碎片给了你。
t_en: A Knight of Beauty gives all his few remaining Cosmic Fragments to you.

t_ch: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
t_en: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

t_ch: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。此刻，一位骑士认为你非常喜欢咕咕钟…
t_en: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. One of the knights thinks you are a fan of cuckoo clocks...

t_ch: 纯美骑士把身上收藏的咕咕钟都给了你！
t_en: The knight gives you his entire collection of cuckoo clocks!

t_ch: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
t_en: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

t_ch: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。此刻，一位骑士认为你非常喜欢奇物…
t_en: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. One of the knights thinks you are a fan of Curios...

t_ch: 纯美骑士把身上的奇物给了你。
t_en: The knight gives you his Curio.

t_ch: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
t_en: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

t_ch: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。他们认为你对星神的信仰十分虔诚…
t_en: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. They consider you a devoted follower of the Aeons...

t_ch: 纯美骑士决定将向你传授「纯美」的精神。
t_en: A Knight of Beauty decides to teach you the spirit of Beauty.

t_ch: 「愿你信仰伊德莉拉。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
t_en: "I hope you believe in Idrila," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

t_ch: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们忧郁地注视着你…
t_en: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty stare at you with melancholic expressions...

t_ch: 一位纯美骑士认为你身上仍有「麻烦」，因而帮你收走了一个咕咕钟。
t_en: One of the knights thinks there are still "problem" on you, so he helps you to take away a cuckoo clock.

t_ch: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
t_en: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

t_ch: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们忧郁地注视着你…
t_en: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty stare at you with melancholic expressions...

t_ch: 一位纯美骑士认为你仍对「奇物」不堪重负，因而帮你将奇物全部换成了宇宙碎片！
t_en: One of the knights thinks you are unable to bear the weight of the Curios, so he replaces all your Curios with Cosmic Fragments!

t_ch: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
t_en: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

t_ch: 一位纯美骑士认为你身上仍有「麻烦」，因而帮你收走了所有的负面奇物。
t_en: One of the knights thinks there are still "problem" on you, so he helps you to take away all Negative Curios.

t_ch: 某天王摇滚巨星粉丝，向你递出他珍藏已久的原声大碟。里面有数十种不同的声音。
t_en: One day, a fan of a major rock star hands you a soundtrack album he has kept for a long time. There are dozens of different voices inside.

t_ch: 「最多噪音的摇滚、最神圣古典的说唱、最时髦的复古元素、最炫彩的朴素装饰音！星际潮玩美食、新推出的说谎游戏纯享奏乐、时代多重大混搭的珍藏大碟！」
t_en: "The noisiest rock music, the most sacred classical rap, the trendiest retro elements, and the most vibrant basic musical ornaments! This precious album showcases the instrumental piece of cosmic trendy toys and food and the latest social deduction game, with a mixture of elements across the ages!"

t_ch: 你恶狠狠地想着——他看上去一定隶属于矛盾元素组织！
t_en: Feeling annoyed, you are certain he is a member of the Contradictory Element Organization!

t_ch: 你来到了一个古怪的太空餐厅。在红砖制的房子里，驻足许多巴维鲁族人、狐人，以及一些人类…你发现甚至有只谛听坐在长桌前。
t_en: You arrive at a strange restaurant in outer space. In the building built with red bricks, there are some Bavirus, foxians, and humans. There is even a Diting sitting at a long table.

t_ch: 然而，一些穿灰色长袍囚衣的流刑犯也在这里…你盯着他们脚上的镣铐，打了个寒颤。你绕了过去，来到较为安全的吧台前。
t_en: Yet, some exiles dressed in gray prisoners' robes are here too... The sight of the shackles on their feet makes you shudder. You bypass them and walk to the bar with its comparative safety.

t_ch: 「专售异星风味鸡尾酒。」接待员的语调听起来也十分古怪，「天才俱乐部#55余清涂流传至今的调饮配方只剩二十五种，这里兜售三种；是否是她的剧毒配方，我不敢保证。要哪杯？」
t_en: "We specialize in exotic cocktails." The waiter speaks in an odd tone. "Out of all the cocktail recipes left by Genius Society #55 Yu Qingtu, only <unbreak>25</unbreak> of them have been passed down to this day. Three of them are available here, but we can't guarantee whether those involve her toxic concoctions. Which one would you like?"

t_ch: 你怀疑起接待员的职业素养。
t_en: You start to doubt the waiter's professionalism.

t_ch: 现在你该搅拌它了。
t_en: It's time to stir it.

t_ch: 你的鸡尾酒在你眼前发生了爆炸！
t_en: Your cocktail explodes in front of you!

t_ch: 你一无所获，这令你非常伤心。
t_en: You feel sad. You gained nothing.

t_ch: 你的鸡尾酒搅拌完成了。一位身着缀有亮片的礼服、目光婀娜的女士突然走过来，她带着珠光的耳坠正在灯光下闪烁，这光芒令你眼花缭乱。她抢走了你的酒，却还对着你笑，她挑衅地对你招了招手。
t_en: You have finished stirring your cocktail. A lady in a sequined dress with a sensuous gaze suddenly walks over. The gems on her earrings sparkle under the lights, and you are bedazzled. She grabs the cocktail from your hands but still waves at you with a provocative smile.

t_ch: 你正气愤不已时，她却突然发出尖锐的哀嚎！她突然可怖地蜷缩起来…你后退了几步。
t_en: While you are still experiencing outrage at her action, she suddenly lets out a shrill cry, and her body curls up in a horrifying manner... You stagger a few steps backward.

t_ch: 天才俱乐部#55余清涂的特调令你惊讶不已。原来你调制出了一杯传说中的有毒鸡尾酒……
t_en: You are shocked by the recipe of Genius Society #55, Yu Qingtu. As it turns out, you have made a legendarily toxic cocktail...

t_ch: 你得到了一杯鸡尾酒！你「咕嘟咕嘟」地喝了下去……
t_en: You receive a glass of cocktail! You gulp it down...

t_ch: 你得到了一杯鸡尾酒！你「咕嘟咕嘟」地喝了下去…睡意席卷了你。
t_en: You receive a glass of cocktail! You gulp it down... Soon, a wave of lethargy hits you.

t_ch: 正在你昏昏沉沉之时，你查觉到长桌另一侧，一个古灵精怪的*窃贼*的目光正打量着你…嗯，她似乎狡黠地坦荡展示了自己的企图。
t_en: As you are feeling drowsy, you notice a mischievous *thief* sizing you up slyly from the other end of the long table... She seems to have no qualms about openly showing her evil intentions.

t_ch: 你未能抵抗得住这股睡意…等到醒来后，身边目光炯炯的窃贼已经消失了。
t_en: You fail to resist the urge to sleep... By the time you wake up, the thief with her dazzling eyes is already gone.

t_ch: 你的钱包也瘪了。你损失了很多宇宙碎片…你希望能再次遇到她。
t_en: Your wallet is no longer stuffed, and you have lost lots of Cosmic Fragments... You hope to run into her again.

t_ch: 在废弃星系的古城，你遇到了一群远古的渴血巨兽。热气腾腾的喘息声拂到你的脸上……
t_en: You encounter a group of ancient bloodthirsty behemoths in an ancient city of an abandoned star system. Their hot, steamy breaths brush against your face...

t_ch: 你注意到它们似乎发生了突变…它的皮肤上覆盖一层鎏金硬壳，似乎正饱受突变之苦。
t_en: You notice signs of mutation on one of them... Its skin is covered by a layer of gilded hard shell, and it seems to be suffering from the mutation.

t_ch: 你与它耷拉的双眸对视。它的胡须上下浮动，你注意到它的身后仍护着几只幼崽……
t_en: You stare straight into its droopy eyes. Its whiskers are moving up and down. You notice it is protecting some cubs behind it...

t_ch: 你不仅一无所获，还被这股强烈的推力炸出了餐厅。
t_en: You gain nothing, in addition to being blasted out of the restaurant by this strong force.

t_ch: 你遇到了一个机械生命，它似乎对奇物修理颇有理解。
t_en: You meet a mechanical lifeform. It seems to be skilled in repairing Curios.

t_ch: 「咔擦…咔擦……」
t_en: "Click... Click..."

t_ch: 它示意你将在乎的宝贝丢给它进行修理。
t_en: It gestures for you to let it repair your treasures.

t_ch: 一个悲悼伶人骑着银河巨象，缓步步入你的视线…她不知为何仍在哭泣。接着，她从银河巨象走了下来，她祈愿为你展现一场「不收费」的奇妙伶人戏法。
t_en: A Mourning Actor riding a cosmic elephant slowly comes into sight... She is still weeping for some reason. Then, she dismounts the cosmic elephant and offers to perform a special magic show to you "for free."

t_ch: 她在你面前，将你的祝福塞到手下的四个杯子里…接着她快速变幻那些杯子！一切瞬间就结束了。伶人将双手放至胸前，礼貌地询问你选择哪一个……
t_en: She stuffs your Blessings into four cups in front of you... Then, she quickly moves the cups around, and the show ends in an instant. The Actor then places her hand on her chest and politely asks you to choose a cup ...

t_ch: 你已完全跟不上了…瞎蒙一个吧！
t_en: You can't keep up at all... Just choose a random one!

t_ch: 星际和平公司「信仰狂热部」的大乐透发行商人出现了！
t_en: The lottery distributor from the Interastral Peace Corporation's Fanaticism Department is here!

t_ch: 「你知道什么是双乐透体验吗？」他小声在你耳边耳语，「我可以为你提供…双乐透体验…呃，只要你为『奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德』的竞选投上一票」
t_en: "Have you heard of the Double Lottery Experience?" He whispers into your ear. "I can provide you with... the Double Lottery Experience... as long as you vote for Oswaldo Schneider in the election."

t_ch: 他用期待的眼神看着你。
t_en: He looks at you with anticipation in his eyes.

t_ch: 「你知道什么是超乐透体验吗？」他小声在你耳边耳语，「我可以为你提供…超乐透体验…呃，只要你为『奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德』的竞选投上一票」
t_en: "Have you heard of the Super Lottery Experience?" He whispers into your ear. "I can provide you with... the Super Lottery Experience... as long as you vote for Oswaldo Schneider in the election."

t_ch: 你跌跌撞撞地闯进一个熟悉的地方。你骤然抬头，看到她站在实验台前——她左手捧着绣面，右手拉起最后一根绣针上的线头，接着轻轻咬断它。
t_en: You stumble into a familiar place. You look up and find her standing before an experiment bench. Holding an embroidered cloth with her left hand, she pulls the thread on the last needle with her right hand before gently biting it off.

t_ch: 「又闯进我的切片了。」阮•梅背对着你，声音不起波澜，「我还未完成作品的培育。」
t_en: "You've barged into my world slice once again." Ruan Mei's voice is calm as she speaks with her back facing you. "I haven't finished cultivating my work yet."

t_ch: 接着，她迟疑几秒，回头看你…僵持几秒后，她叹了口气，从实验台走下来。糕点的清香扑鼻而来。「来了…就正好帮我瞅瞅。这几个图案哪个是『完美作品』？」
t_en: She hesitates for a few seconds before turning around to look at you... After a moment of tense silence, she sighs and steps down from the bench. The mouthwatering scent of snacks permeates the air. "Since you're here, take a look at these patterns for me, and pick the one you think is the perfect masterpiece."

t_ch: 「答对了…就有奖励。」
t_en: "If you answer it correctly... you'll be rewarded."

t_ch: 齿轮…
t_en: The gear...

t_ch: 人偶…
t_en: The puppet...

t_ch: 背带裤…
t_en: The pair of overalls...

t_ch: 「不错的回答。你无需紧张，生命的定义中从未有过『完美作品』，我只考验你的衷心倾向哪边。」阮•梅起身走回自己的试验台，她的鞋跟踩在地上发出清脆的响声，「没有标准答案的问题被设立，本就是为了令人寻找得不到的答案。」
t_en: "Great choice. Don't sweat over it. There's no such thing as a perfect masterpiece in life. I was just testing the inclination of your heart." Ruan Mei returns to the bench. Her heels give off a crisp clacking sound when she walks. "Questions without a standard answer are created to search for the unattainable answers."

t_ch: 「拿奖励吧。」
t_en: "Here's your reward."

t_ch: 在空荡的星际百货大楼里，一个街机出现在你面前。潮流扭蛋人、以太球和黏土玩偶堆叠在柜窗内，电子音乐和五彩的灯光随着你的到来而亮起。
t_en: An arcade machine appears in front of you in the deserted Interastral Department Store building. Trendy gachapon figures, ether orbs, and clay dolls are stacked inside the display cabinet. Electronic music and colorful lights come alive as you approach.

t_ch: 「我是街机中的*完美型男*！」这个街机开始播放电子音，你认为这是某位玩味的程序爱好者为其设计好输入的声音……
t_en: "I'm the perfect man in the arcade!" The arcade machine starts to play an electronic voice. You suppose this was added by a playful programmer...

t_ch: 你止不住打了个寒颤——你怀疑其中有诈！
t_en: You can't help but shudder - You suspect that there must be a catch!

t_ch: 完美的开局音乐在你耳边响起……
t_en: Perfect music that signals the start of the game blares off next to your ears...

t_ch: 你走开前踹了一脚*完美型男*，接着被石头绊倒了…你恶狠狠地想着，这也是程序设计的恶意之一！
t_en: Before leaving, you give the perfect man a kick and trip over a stone... Irritated, you are certain it is another trick set up by the programmer!

t_ch: 「黏土玩偶」随着「抓夹」上升...成功了！
t_en: The clay doll rises together with the claw... You've got it!

t_ch: 你获得了一个*完美*的「黏土玩偶」！
t_en: You've won a *perfect* clay doll!

t_ch: 「黏土玩偶」随着「抓夹」上升...
t_en: The clay doll rises together with the claw...

t_ch: 「黏土玩偶」从「抓夹」上掉落，你一无所获。
t_en: The clay doll drops from the claw. You get nothing.

t_ch: 你缓慢地将「抓夹」挪到目标上…你失去耐心了！你狠狠地踢了机器一脚只为希望它快一点！
t_en: You slowly move the claw to your target... and lose your patience! You give the machine a vicious kick, hoping it can make the claw move faster!

t_ch: 出乎意料——你的神之一脚让机器电压猛烈升高！「抓夹」哐当一下把一只*黏土玩偶*的头夹了起来，接着它不受控制地旋转、扭曲着扭蛋人的脖子！
t_en: Surprisingly, your powerful kick gives the voltage of the machine a surge! With a clank, the claw grabs a trendy *clay doll* by its head. It starts spinning out of control, twisting the figure's head!

t_ch: *黏土玩偶*的头被抓爆了！一些礼花从脑袋里爆开，你目瞪口呆地望着这一诡异的场面。
t_en: The head of the clay doll explodes! Fireworks burst out from the head, and you watch the bizarre scene with your jaw on the floor.

t_ch: 「完美…完美…宇宙需要*完美*！」它最后的程序如此说道。
t_en: "Perfect... Perfect... The universe needs *perfection*!" The final program says.

t_ch: 「潮流扭蛋人」随着「抓夹」上升...成功了！
t_en: The trendy gachapon figure rises with the claw... You've got it!

t_ch: 你获得了一个*完美*的「潮流扭蛋人」！
t_en: You've won a *perfect* trendy gachapon figure!

t_ch: 「潮流扭蛋人」随着「抓夹」上升...
t_en: The trendy gachapon figure rises with the claw...

t_ch: 「潮流扭蛋人」从「抓夹」上掉落，你一无所获。
t_en: The trendy gachapon figure drops from the claw. You get nothing.

t_ch: 你还要继续吗？
t_en: Do you want to continue?

t_ch: 你还想继续玩…但这个街机坏掉了。下次再来吧。
t_en: You want to continue playing, but the arcade machine has broken. Just come back next time.

t_ch: 你遇到一位栗色卷发、满脸雀斑的男士，他称自己是「黑森林」地带的挖掘者。在他的形容下，那是一个充满神秘气息的地带：据说森林中有着无数预言机、写诗机以及各种齿轮机械生命，有机生命对此少有涉足。
t_en: You encounter a freckled man with curly chestnut hair who introduces himself as a digger in the Black Forest. He describes the forest as a mysterious place. It is said that in the forest there are numerous prophecy machines, poet machines, and all kinds of mechanical lifeforms operating on gears. Organic lifeforms rarely set foot there.

t_ch: 他见到你，犹如见到有潜力被发展的同好，立刻面露喜悦！他把自己的「藏品」——咕咕钟塞到你手里。
t_en: His face brightens up the moment he sees you, as though he has just found a potential fellow enthusiast. He places his treasure — a cuckoo clock — into your hands.

t_ch: 「带一个咕咕钟回去体验吧！」咕咕钟狂热爱好者说，「我保证你也会爱上咕咕钟。」
t_en: "Bring a cuckoo clock home and try using it!" The cuckoo clock fanatic says. "I'm sure you'll fall in love with cuckoo clocks."

t_ch: 他非常激动，认为遇到了同样识货的爱好者！
t_en: He is thrilled, thinking that he has met someone who shares his taste!

t_ch: 他被你拒绝，立刻面露忧愁，看来他的内心十分敏感——但这并没有影响到他的狂热！
t_en: He looks upset when you turn him down. He seems to be a very sensitive person, but that does not dampen his fervor!

t_ch: 「请…请收下吧…我的推荐一直失败，从没有人懂得欣赏一只咕咕钟。如果真的没有人懂得欣赏咕咕钟…我的生命将变得毫无价值……」他眼含热泪地说着…几乎将要哭了出来。
t_en: "Please... Please take it... I've never succeeded in promoting the cuckoo clocks. Nobody could appreciate them. If no one could really appreciate the cuckoo clocks... then my life will be meaningless..." His eyes glisten with tears, and he is on the verge of crying.

t_ch: 他把你的肩膀推了个圈，让你赶紧回家研究——带着咕咕钟回去享受吧！
t_en: He keeps pushing your shoulder as he persuades you to go home and study the cuckoo clock - Just take it back home and enjoy using it!

t_ch: 你又一次遇见了栗色卷发的咕咕钟狂热粉丝！他看见你，热切地与你打了个招呼。你注意到他正挂断与「黑森林」地带的挖掘者伙伴的电话……
t_en: You run into the cuckoo clock fanatic with the curly chestnut hair again! He greets you enthusiastically when he sees you. You notice that he has just ended a phone conversation with a Black Forest digger...

t_ch: 「又见到你了！我们正准备建立咕咕钟爱好者协会！你还想体会一下其他的咕咕钟魔力吗？」…你还未做好心理准备，他的热情就已扑面而来。
t_en: "It's you again! We're going to establish the Cuckoo Clock Fan Club! Would you like to experience the charm of other cuckoo clocks?" His enthusiasm is at full power before you are even ready for it.

t_ch: 你又得到了一只咕咕钟！在这种攻势下，你开始恐惧自己终有一天会走上咕咕钟狂热粉丝的道路……
t_en: You've received another cuckoo clock! If things go on at this rate, you might one day become a cuckoo clock fanatic yourself. That thought puts you in fear...

t_ch: 他十分悲伤，他不能理解竟有人可以抵抗一只咕咕钟的诱惑……
t_en: He is devastated. He cannot understand how someone can resist the temptation of a cuckoo clock...

t_ch: 他叹着气离开了。
t_en: He leaves with a sigh.

t_ch: 这一次，你有所心理准备。当你看到栗色卷发的咕咕钟狂热粉丝再次向你走来时，你相信他真的决不放弃——但你也是有备而来！
t_en: This time, you are mentally prepared for it. When you see the cuckoo clock fanatic with curly chestnut hair walking in your direction, you are convinced that nothing will make him give up. However, you are ready to face him!

t_ch: 「噢，我的老朋友，好久不见！我刚告别黑森林中所有的无机生命。」咕咕钟狂热粉丝见到你，立刻开始泣涕连连，「我正联系星际和平公司业务拓展部，他们答应为我们在宇宙中宣扬咕咕钟爱好者！很快我们的队伍将会更加壮大！」
t_en: "Oh, my old friend! It's been a long time! I've just bid farewell with all the inorganic beings in the Black Forest." The cuckoo clock fanatic starts sobbing when he sees you. "I've contacted the Business Development Department of the IPC, and they've promised to help us promote our fan club in the universe! We'll be a stronger team soon!"

t_ch: 你看到他身后还有不少新采掘出的咕咕钟……
t_en: There are a lot of newly excavated cuckoo clocks behind him...

t_ch: 你感到自己终于无法抵抗地变成了咕咕钟狂热粉丝…
t_en: You can feel yourself succumbing helplessly and turning into a cuckoo clock fanatic...

t_ch: 他非常开心！你终于领略到他用尽一生所推动的事业——令众人都能理解集成式交换咕咕钟的快乐！
t_en: He is over the moon! You finally comprehend the great work he spent his life setting into motion - The great work of making everyone understand the joy of ensembled tradeable cuckoo clocks!

t_ch: 他非常开心！你终于领略到他用尽一生所推动的事业——令众人都能理解集成式交换咕咕钟的快乐！
t_en: He is over the moon! You finally comprehend the great work he spent his life setting into motion - The great work of making everyone understand the joy of ensembled tradeable cuckoo clocks!

t_ch: 这是你来到星际和平公司的第一天。你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的星际和平员工。
t_en: This is your first day at the Interastral Peace Corporation. Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent IPC employee.

t_ch: 你骄傲地挺起了胸膛！你胸前的「P<unbreak>-13</unbreak>」级别标识在太阳下闪闪发光，不，「P<unbreak>-13</unbreak>」怎可定义你？你的*野心*可远不止于此……
t_en: You straighten up confidently! The level P<unbreak>-13</unbreak> staff badge on your chest gleams brightly under the sun. But no... P<unbreak>-13</unbreak> is not going to define you! Your *ambition* reaches far beyond it...

t_ch: 这是你获得升职的第一天！你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的「P<unbreak>-16</unbreak>」正式职工，带领好手下新来的临时雇佣工。你的目光已经投向更高的金字塔顶尖…
t_en: This is your first day after being promoted! Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent official P<unbreak>-16</unbreak> employee and a good supervisor to the new temporary workers. You already have your eyes set even higher along the corporate ladder...

t_ch: 哼…你翻阅着星际和平手册对公司领导层的介绍。那面庞英俊、能言善辩的「P<unbreak>-25</unbreak>」分部领导令你不悦…也许，你会比他更有才能？
t_en: Hmph... You flip through the overview of the IPC's directors in the Interastral Peace Handbook. That level P<unbreak>-25</unbreak> branch director with a handsome face and an articulate silver tongue annoys you... Perhaps you are more talented than him?

t_ch: 现在…到了你表现自我的时刻。
t_en: Now... it's time for you to showcase your talent.

t_ch: 这是你获得升职的第二天！你望着高耸入云的星际和平分部大楼，决心成为一名出色的「公司高级员工」。
t_en: This is your second day after being promoted! Staring at the towering IPC branch building, you are determined to become an excellent senior IPC staff.

t_ch: 听说分部最近人心惶惶，一些员工似乎因工作犯错而被秘密处理。但你仍然沉浸在自己将会晋升的美好愿景里，你认为自己应该将此生的目标定为「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」，分部的领导者！即便「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」仍离总部的大门还有很长距离，但对于你这位青年才俊那都不是问题！
t_en: You hear that some employees were secretly fired due to work-related mistakes lately, and this has put everyone at the branch on edge. Nevertheless, you are still immersed in the belief that you will be promoted in the future. Reaching level P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>, branch director, should be your lifetime goal! Although P<unbreak>-35</unbreak> still has a long way to go before you reach the headquarters' gates, it won't be a problem for a young talent like you!

t_ch: 哼…你翻阅着星际和平手册对公司大人物的介绍。在*在田*的领导下，传统项目部已被嘲笑为「养老院」。*姆托尤因•拉杰•扎扎德*？她只会让「人才激励部」的家伙制作点小恩小惠的计划…你越来越猖獗、自信…「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」？不！你甚至觉得自己终有一日可以挑战「P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>」*疤眼夫人*！
t_en: Hmph... You flip through the overview of the IPC's big shots in the Interastral Peace Handbook. Under Arita's leadership, the Traditional Project Department has been mockingly dubbed the "retirement home." Mtooyin Raj Zazzad? She only knows how to come up with plans that award employees in the Talent Motivation Department with petty benefits... You become more and more audacious and confident... P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>? No! You believe you can even one day challenge level P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>, the *Madam Scarred Eye*!

t_ch: 这是你获得升职的第三天！不知为何，你已经成为整座高楼空地的拥有者！
t_en: This is your third day after being promoted! For some reason, you have become the owner of all the space in the entire high-rise!

t_ch: 你将一个自制的「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」徽章别在胸前，你认为这时应当向众人炫耀你的功绩了！
t_en: You pin a self-made level P<unbreak>-35</unbreak> badge on your chest, thinking it's time you show off your accomplishments to everyone!

t_ch: *路易斯·弗莱明**奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德*…那些寰宇最顶级、名号最响亮的大人物，他们对你来说曾高不可攀！但——有朝一日，你相信自己能够顶替他们！
t_en: The most well-known figures in the universe, such as Louis Fleming and Oswaldo Schneider, were once out of your league. But now, you believe you can replace them in the future!

t_ch: 没有大人物回应你！你突然认清了现实…你对着空地吸了一口烟，沿着空旷的街道一直往后走…最终你靠在了水泥柱前，你的面容变得颓唐、忧愁。
t_en: None of the big shots responds to you! Suddenly, you come to terms with reality... You take a puff of cigarette while staring at empty space, then walk back along the deserted street... At last, you lean on a cement pillar, looking low-spirited and crestfallen.

t_ch: 是的…这不是你意料之中的结局，究竟哪一步走错了？你开始渴望人生可以重头再来，也许那时你会选择不一样的…道路？
t_en: Indeed... this is not the outcome you have expected. What did you do to make things so wrong? You wish you could start everything over. Perhaps, you would have chosen a different path in the beginning.

t_ch: …你昏沉地失去了意识，原来被欲望吞没的员工，都会被*奇妙处理*，并成为公司秘密会议室墙上的一枚头像画章。
t_en: ...You slowly lose consciousness. As it turns out, all employees consumed by greed are subject to a mysterious treatment that will turn them into portraits on the walls of the IPC's secret conference room.

t_ch: 你漫步在蓝色礁湖前，穿过缀满紫罗兰的花园，接着绕过象牙白石制成的殿堂，走上金碧辉煌的楼梯…直到你面见「星际和平分部银行」的招牌。
t_en: You stroll alongside a blue lagoon, pass through a garden full of hoary stocks, and go around a hall of ivory and white stones. You walk up a grand golden staircase... and stop in front of the "IPC Branch Bank" sign.

t_ch: 这里的一切装饰都昂贵而夺目…你来到了柜台前。
t_en: Every piece of ornament here is posh and dazzling... You walk up to the counter.

t_ch: 「存得越多…额外的利息报酬也越多。」柜员的笑容极具感染力，他举止优雅得体，你相信他是受过公司「人才激励部」培训的优秀员工。
t_en: "The more you deposit, the higher the interest rate." The teller has an infectious smile and an elegant demeanor. You believe he is an excellent employee trained by the Talent Motivation Department of the IPC.

t_ch: 金碧辉煌的穹顶令你难以忘怀。在璀璨夺目的各类星系藏品围绕中…你又一次来到了「星际和平分部银行」。你把手伸进了兜里，做好了准备。
t_en: The magnificent glittering dome leaves an unforgettable impression on you. Surrounded by marvelous collectibles from various star systems... you find yourself at the IPC Branch Bank again. You reach into your pockets and are ready to take action.

t_ch: 「存得越多…额外的利息报酬也越多！」熟悉的声音响起。
t_en: "The more you deposit, the higher the interest rate!" A familiar voice arrives.

t_ch: 你把空空如也的口袋兜翻出来——展示给星际和平分部柜员！他的笑容凝固在嘴角，现在是你取得被许诺报酬的时候了！
t_en: You show your empty pockets to the bank teller, and the smile on his face freezes! It's time you claim your promised rewards!

t_ch: 遨游模拟宇宙八百万里，从没有人真正理解过你的内心…
t_en: Despite having traversed the Simulated Universe for eight million miles, you did not find anyone who truly understood you...

t_ch: 总是测试项目令你疲倦。你决定在模拟宇宙里收留一只虫子做你的伙伴。
t_en: You are tired of continuously testing one project after another. So, you decide to adopt a worm as your companion in the Simulated Universe.

t_ch: 你打量着眼前这位伙伴：这条太空美虫「着涎香」，伤口周围分泌出次生代谢物，散发特别的花、果、蜜香气味…你知道将它抚养长大后，它终将出没于奇异果香、银河茶园之间，它的每次旅行或许都会为你带来*爱*的气息。
t_en: You observe your companion: This beautiful space worm is named Sweet Saliva. It secretes secondary metabolites around its wound that give off a unique flowery, fruity, and sweet scent... You know that when it matures, it will linger around the exotic fruit orchards and cosmic tea plantations. Each of its trips may bring the scent of *love* to you.

t_ch: 虽然你一贫如洗…但你仍然可以用尽全力呵护它。
t_en: Although you are destitute... you can still do your best to nurture it.

t_ch: 你的太空美虫蠕动着，它对着你的脸蛋「啪嗒」一口，向你表示了感谢。
t_en: Your space worm wriggles and spurts a mouthful of saliva at your face to show its gratitude to you.

t_ch: 噢…你觉得自己好幸福！
t_en: Oh... You feel so happy!

t_ch: 你的太空美虫蠕动着，你等待着它对着你的脸蛋「啪嗒」一口…
t_en: Your space worm is wriggling. You wait for it to spurt a mouthful of saliva at your face...

t_ch: 但它却一跃而起，用尾巴扫了下你的脸！你被打得好痛！
t_en: However, it leaps and smacks its tail against your face instead! It hurts a lot!

t_ch: …看来它似乎并不喜欢被这么对待。
t_en: ...Seems like it hates to be treated this way.

t_ch: 时光如梭。你所抚养的太空美虫「着涎香」已去星际茶园沉浸式学习已久…当你听到门口出现摸索的声音时，你便知道它归来了。
t_en: Time flies. The space worm named Sweet Saliva that you have nurtured has been undergoing immersive learning at the cosmic tea plantation for a long time... When you hear the sound of fumbling at the door, you know it is back.

t_ch: 你打开门——它长大了。它从那种茶菁的表皮中褪色，蜕变出一种掺杂着白毫、黄绿以及褐青色的斑斓花纹…这是「着涎香」已成为成虫的证明。它发出着阵阵呼唤…那是对你*爱*的证明。
t_en: You open the door and find that it has grown up. Its skin, which was initially green, has faded and is now covered by a colorful pattern that is a mixture of white, yellowish green, and brownish blue hues... They are the signs that Sweet Saliva has matured into an adult bug. It calls out for you... which is the proof of its *love* for you.

t_ch: 你露出了宽慰的、悲怀的笑容。
t_en: A relieved and sorrowful smile breaks out on your face.

t_ch: 一个背着垃圾桶的人遇到了你。他蹲了下来，向你展示它的宝贝垃圾桶。
t_en: A person carrying a trashcan meets you. He crouches down and shows you his treasured trashcan.

t_ch: 「这是一个神奇的空间。」他摆了摆手，把那些酸酸情诗掏出来扔掉，为你腾出空间。
t_en: "This is an incredulous space." He beckons. Then, he tosses out some collections of pitiful love poems from the trashcan to make some space for you.

t_ch: 他小声对你说，「将你的废物投入，它们会进化出一些进步意识…然后自己精神焕发地跑出来！」
t_en: In a hushed voice, he says, "Put your waste in it, and the items will evolve into an advanced awareness, then come running out energetically on their own!"

t_ch: 你遇到了一片「超验之镜」的巨大碎片，碎片下供奉着三盏烛火。
t_en: You come across a massive fragment of the Mirror of Transcendence. Three candles are placed beneath it as offerings.

t_ch: 你来回驻足、摩梭……
t_en: You walk back and forth while being deep in your thoughts...

t_ch: 一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！
t_en: As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!

t_ch: 「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
t_en: "I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.

t_ch: 一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！
t_en: As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!

t_ch: 「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
t_en: "I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.

t_ch: 一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！
t_en: As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!

t_ch: 「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
t_en: "I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.

t_ch: 烛火被你点亮，你期许着…
t_en: After lighting up a candle, you make a wish...

t_ch: 你未能得到回应。
t_en: Nothing happens.

t_ch: 你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
t_en: You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

t_ch: 这位「永眠领主」双眼紧闭，它看上去沉浸在自己的梦境中。
t_en: The Lord of Eternal Slumber has both its eyes closed. It seems to be lost in its dreams.

t_ch: 你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……
t_en: You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...

t_ch: 你还是选择了绕路…你屏息静气，目光注视着前方道路——但你忽视了脚底…你不小心碰到一些碎石！
t_en: In the end, you still decide to take a detour... You steady your breath and fix your gaze on the path ahead. Yet, you overlook the ground and step on some gravel accidentally.

t_ch: 你紧张地回头看了眼它…它并没有被你惊醒。
t_en: Anxiously, you glance back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber... It remains asleep.

t_ch: 你将孢子全部收纳进你的无限背包中。这可是珍贵的研究样本…你庆幸着。
t_en: You put all the spores into your limitless backpack, feeling lucky to have stumbled upon the precious research samples.

t_ch: 突然！你同时感觉到无数隐秘的眼睛在黑暗中注视着你…你再次看向「永眠领主」，它正闭目沉睡。或许你刚刚的动静太大了？你对此感到一丝后怕……
t_en: Suddenly, you can sense countless hidden eyes staring at you from the darkness... When you look back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber again, it is still sleeping with its eyes closed. Maybe you made too much noise just now. You feel a hint of unease creeping in...

t_ch: 你似乎迷路了…你发觉这里的景色十分熟悉。你认出于腐殖化王座之上的「永眠领主」。
t_en: You seem to be lost... and you find the scenery around you familiar. You can recognize the Lord of Eternal Slumber on the putrefied throne.

t_ch: 但这次似乎有些不同。它的身边多了更多*孢夹*，在那些半透明的液囊中，你似乎认出了一些有机生命…他们的身上有着「开拓」的标志。
t_en: But something is different this time. There are more *Sporangium* around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. In the translucent sacs, there seem to be some organic lifeforms... The insignia of Trailblaze can be found on their bodies.

t_ch: 你快步离开了……
t_en: You walk away hurriedly...

t_ch: 你正准备离开之时，一位被浸泡在液囊里的无名客发出了哀嚎！他似乎正提醒着你可帮助他们逃脱的解药名称…「代谢酶」……
t_en: When you are leaving, one of the sac-submerged Nameless lets out a wail! He seems to be hinting at the name of the antidote that can help them escape — Metabolase...

t_ch: 你靠近了那些孢夹。正当你想触碰之时，一位被浸泡在液囊里的无名客发出了哀嚎！他似乎示意你别碰！他断断续续地向你吐露可帮助他们逃脱的解药名称…「代谢酶」……
t_en: You approach the Sporangium. Just as you want to reach out for the sacs, one of the Nameless submerged in them lets out a wail to stop you from touching them! After much struggle, he utters the name of the antidote that can help them escape — Metabolase...

t_ch: 你靠近了那些孢夹——你触碰到了它！一些奇异的电流窜过你的脑海，你如同断电一般失足滑落。一些幼体虫群似乎被这声音惊扰，它们发出窸窸窣窣的声音！
t_en: You approach the Sporangium and touch them! A strange jolt of electricity shoots straight up to your head, causing you to lose your footing as if you were shocked. Startled by the noise, some Swarm larvae wriggle around, producing a rustling sound.

t_ch: 你回头看了眼仍在沉睡的领主…你不甘心地抓紧时间，赶在被虫群包围前离开了。
t_en: You glance back at the Lord of Eternal Slumber, still sleeping. Reluctantly, you hurry up and leave before the Swarm can surround you.

t_ch: 你手握代谢酶，缓步踏入腐殖化王座前…你十分紧张…你相信只需要一丁点剂量，只要沿着虫群的纤维……你扎了下去！
t_en: Holding a syringe containing Metabolase, you stride toward the putrefied throne slowly and nervously... All it takes is a tiny dose deliver into the Swarm's fibers and... You pierce it with the needle!

t_ch: 这一剂令「永眠领主」从永眠中醒来！它立刻睁大双眼，口水从齿间低落……
t_en: The dose wakes the Lord of Eternal Slumber up! It opens its eyes wide and starts drooling...

t_ch: 你知道*代谢*需要时间…你要等到见证代谢完成的那一刻！但此刻更多幼体虫群到来了！你需要从中迅速脱身…
t_en: You know metabolism takes time... and you want to witness its completion! However, more and more Swarm larvae are coming! You must escape from them quickly...

t_ch: 突然！你同时感觉到无数隐秘的眼睛在黑暗中注视着你…尖锐的附足沿着振动寻到你的方位，饥饿的幼体虫群将你团团包围。
t_en: Suddenly, you feel as though countless concealed eyes are gazing at you from the darkness! As numerous sharp appendages manage to locate you by following the vibrations, the hungry Swarm larvae surround you completely.

t_ch: 你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
t_en: You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

t_ch: 这位「永眠领主」双眼紧闭，它看上去沉浸在自己的梦境中。
t_en: The Lord of Eternal Slumber has both its eyes closed. It seems to be lost in its dreams.

t_ch: 你看了看手中紧握的地图…你的行进方向被阻塞了！你正准备绕路离开，却发现它的身旁聚拢着一些刚诞育的*孢子*。一些充满勇气的想法从你的心中绽开……
t_en: You check the map in your hand... and find that your way ahead is blocked! As you are about to take a detour, you notice some newly born *spores* gathering around the Lord of Eternal Slumber. A daring idea blossoms in your mind...

t_ch: 你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
t_en: You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.

t_ch: 你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。
t_en: You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.

t_ch: 这些「鏖兜虫」发出了吮吸的声音…你犹豫是否要进入猎杀它们，这或许会让你的身上沾上更多惹人注意的虫类气味……
t_en: These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...

t_ch: 你悄悄离开了…你希望身上没有沾上「鏖兜虫」的味道。
t_en: You walk away quietly, hoping you remain untainted by the scent of the Combatobugs.

t_en: You flee in a hurry, hoping you didn't get the scent of Combatobug's on you.

t_ch: 你熟练地戴上皮手套。作为一位「漫游徘徊者」，对于刺杀区域「脑体」这种活儿你已再熟练不过。
t_en: You slide your leather gloves on with practice. As a Roamer, you can assassinate *the brain* of a domain with your eyes closed.

t_ch: 是的…在这种遮天蔽日的虫潮之下，总有逆骨反道而行。虽然作为临时雇佣兵的你并不能得到多少报酬…但好歹你还拥有着自己的搭档「设备助理」。
t_en: Indeed... In these Swarm-swollen days, it's no surprise that there are rebels trying to go against the flow. Although you are not rewarded handsomely for your work as a temporary mercenary, you count yourself lucky that you still have your partner, the Device Assistant, by your side.

t_ch: 只是现在…有些麻烦。你正被一些「雕虫小技」包围着…你手里握着无线电，正犹豫是否要向搭档拨通电话。
t_en: But now... things are getting tricky. You find yourself surrounded by some "small fries"... Gripping your radio, you consider whether to contact your partner.

t_ch: 你的无线电接通成功了。
t_en: You get through to your partner using the radio.

t_ch: 你的电流似乎被一种不明精神体拦截…你不安地思考着是否该区域「脑体」的警戒值提高了。
t_en: Your electrical currents seem to be intercepted by an unknown spiritual entity... Feeling on edge, you wonder whether it is because the alert level of *the brain* of the domain has been raised.

t_ch: 你准备继续向前…你应当十分谨慎、小心。
t_en: You are ready to move on... You should be acting very cautiously.

t_ch: 你正在前去刺杀区域「脑体」的路上。
t_en: You are on your way to eliminating the *the brain* of the domain.

t_ch: 事实上，你刚告别一位混沌医师。他的话令你有所深思：「繁育」的虫群只是一群除繁育本能外毫无智能的虫子，究竟是什么人将其改造为这种「神经网络兵器」？
t_en: In fact, you have just parted ways with a Doctor of Chaos, the words of whom are thought-provoking: The Swarm of Propagation is just a bunch of bugs bereft any true intellect beyond their breeding instincts. Who, then, transformed them into this manner of weaponized neural network?

t_ch: 你定睛一看——面前已有一群漫天虫潮作战部队。
t_en: You look closer and notice there is an army of insects in front of you.

t_ch: 你感到神清气爽，如同清凉药剂抹在天灵盖上！但你接着开始看到第IX机关在天上乱跑的景象，你感到自己有些不太对劲了…可恶的混沌医师！你决定立刻绕路离开。
t_en: You feel so rejuvenated as though you have just slathered some cooling ointment on your forehead! But then you star seeing Device IX shifting across the sky, and start to feel unwell... It must be the fault of that Doctor of Chaos! You decide to take a detour and leave immediately.

t_ch: 你感到自己变得虚弱了…你的肠胃有些不适！可恶的混沌医师！你决定立刻绕路逃跑。
t_en: You can feel yourself getting weak... your stomach twisting and churning! It must be the fault of that Doctor of Chaos! You decide to take a detour and leave immediately.

t_ch: 你准备继续向前…你应当十分谨慎、小心。
t_en: You are ready to move on... You should be acting very cautiously.

t_ch: 终于到了这一刻——你来到这里，黄沙吹起你的披风，你将直面刺杀「古脑体」。
t_en: Finally, the moment has come. Your cloak flaps in the sandy wind, and you will soon be facing the *ancient brain*.

t_ch: 你需要带着你的「设备助理」来时刻确认自己的状态。是的…「古脑体」将会影响你的精神。
t_en: You need to carry your Device Assistant with you to ensure you maintain a normal mental state. Yes... the *ancient brain* will affect your consciousness.

t_ch: 你将莫洛托斯鸡尾酒制成的燃烧瓶向其投掷…你成功了！「古脑体」看上去很爱吃这种*热锅*佳肴。
t_en: You throw a Molotov cocktail at it... and succeed! It seems like the *ancient brain* loves piping hot delicacies.
